basic_details.job_title: NHM Tamilnadu Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: National Health Mission - Tamil Nadu, State Health Systems Resource Centre (SHSRC)
basic_details.short_information: NHM Tamil Nadu is recruiting for 1 Consultant - HTA position on a contractual basis.

qualification.details: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration: Rs. 40,000 - Rs. 60,000 (commensurate with qualifications, experience and seniority). Applicable taxes will be deducted as per rules. Field visit expenses will be reimbursed as per NHM guidelines. | Conduct Health Technology Assessments (HTA) for new interventions, diagnostics, and biomedical equipment. Assess clinical effectiveness, safety, cost-effectiveness, and health system impact. Provide evidence-based recommendations for technology adoption and procurement. Coordinate with national and state HTA institutions including ICMR institutes and DHR. Prepare HTA reports, policy briefs, and technical documents.
qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Biomedical Engineering / Medical Electronics / Biomedical Instrumentation / Medical Technology or related disciplines OR Medical Graduate with PG in Health Technology Assessment / Health Economics / Public Health / Health Systems.
qualification.experience: Minimum 2-5 years of experience in health systems, biomedical technology, research, health economics or technology assessment.

how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates may submit their applications as per the prescribed format (available in the ToR) along with detailed CV and supporting documents to the concerned authority (as mentioned in the official notification) on or before 23.07.2026.
The engagement is purely contractual and can be terminated by either party with one month’s notice.
This is not a regular government post.
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further process.

content_sections.heading: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Health Technology Assessment Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: National Health Mission - Tamil Nadu has invited applications for one position of Consultant - Health Technology Assessment under the State Health Systems Resource Centre (SHSRC) to support evidence-based evaluation of health technologies, biomedical equipment, and medical interventions. Download NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant HTA Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Health Technology Assessment Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NHM Tamil Nadu is recruiting for 1 Consultant - HTA position on a contractual basis.

rows.national_health_mission_tamil_nadu_state: Mission Director, National Health Mission - Tamil Nadu

content_sections.heading: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Health Technology Assessment Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Health Technology Assessment Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Health Technology Assessment Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration: Rs. 40,000 - Rs. 60,000 (commensurate with qualifications, experience and seniority). Applicable taxes will be deducted as per rules. Field visit expenses will be reimbursed as per NHM guidelines. Conduct Health Technology Assessments (HTA) for new interventions, diagnostics, and biomedical equipment. Assess clinical effectiveness, safety, cost-effectiveness, and health system impact. Provide evidence-based recommendations for technology adoption and procurement. Coordinate with national and state HTA institutions including ICMR institutes and DHR. Prepare HTA reports, policy briefs, and technical documents.

rows.details: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Biomedical Engineering / Medical Electronics / Biomedical Instrumentation / Medical Technology or related disciplines OR Medical Graduate with PG in Health Technology Assessment / Health Economics / Public Health / Health Systems.
Minimum 2-5 years of experience in health systems, biomedical technology, research, health economics or technology assessment.
Maximum 45 years as on the date of notification.
Familiarity with biomedical equipment management, HTA methodologies, data analysis, report writing, and understanding of public health systems.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Health Technology Assessment Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates may submit their applications as per the prescribed format (available in the ToR) along with detailed CV and supporting documents to the concerned authority (as mentioned in the official notification) on or before 23.07.2026. The engagement is purely contractual and can be terminated by either party with one month’s notice. This is not a regular government post. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant HTA 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Consultant Health Technology Assessment in NHM Tamil Nadu?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration ranges from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for NHM Tamil Nadu HTA Consultant position?
faq.answer: Bachelor’s/Master’s in Biomedical Engineering or Medical Graduate with PG in Health Economics/Public Health/HTA with 2–5 years relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the tenure of the Consultant HTA post at SHSRC Tamil Nadu?
faq.answer: Initially for 11 months, extendable based on performance and requirements.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Health Technology Assessment Recruitment?
faq.answer: Submit the application in the prescribed format along with CV and documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for NHM Tamil Nadu HTA Consultant?
faq.answer: Maximum 45 years as on the date of notification.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key responsibilities of the HTA Consultant in Tamil Nadu?
faq.answer: Conducting HTA for medical technologies, equipment assessment, evidence synthesis, and providing policy recommendations.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience mandatory for NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant position?
faq.answer: Yes, minimum 2–5 years of experience in health systems, biomedical technology, or technology assessment is required.

faq.question: Q9. Is the NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant HTA position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a contractual position under SHSRC, National Health Mission.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Refer to the Terms of Reference (ToR) released by State Health Systems Resource Centre (SHSRC), NHM Tamil Nadu.
